response:
<<palindrome puzzle>>  

module 1: identify the initial URL to replace  
the initial URL is http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1.  

module 2: calculate the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous URL  
the sum of the squares of the digits of http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 5² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 25 = 55.  

module 3: generate the sequence of URLs for each year from 1 to 5  
the URL at year 1 is http://yahoo.com/abc1, at year 2 is http://yahoo.com/def2, at year 3 is http://yahoo.com/ghi3, at year 4 is http://yahoo.com/jkl4, and at year 5 is http://yahoo.com/mno5.  

module 4: validate that each URL adheres to the rule  
each URL is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous URL.  
player
